name: Use of Externally-Controlled Input to Select Classes or Code ('Unsafe Reflection')
description: The product uses external input with reflection mechanisms to select which classes, methods, or code to instantiate or execute without proper validation. An attacker can supply crafted input to load unintended classes, bypassing security controls or executing arbitrary code.
detection_pattern: An INGRESS node provides externally-controlled input that flows to a TRANSFORM[reflection] or EXTERNAL[class_load] node that dynamically instantiates classes or invokes methods without an AUTH[allowlist] or CONTROL[input_validation] mediator restricting which classes or methods can be selected.
